overall.description: A third-person perspective follows a character walking through a foggy, rain-soaked dystopian urban environment at night. The journey begins in a narrow concrete corridor before opening onto a street lined with industrial structures, neon signage, and power lines, with vehicles occasionally passing by. The scene features the distinctive visual style of Cyberpunk 2077 with its characteristic blue-green color grading and atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow concrete service corridor between high walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow corridor flanked by high concrete walls on both sides

entered.detail: tall concrete retaining wall running along the left side of the path
tall concrete retaining wall running along the right side of the path
overhanging covered walkway or building entrance with fluorescent lighting
high voltage electrical transmission towers with multiple cables stretching across the sky
large industrial oil pumpjack silhouetted against the foggy sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, enclosed concrete corridor with high walls on both sides. The camera follows the character walking forward on wet asphalt toward an opening where industrial power lines and a distant oil derrick are visible through the haze. The atmosphere is damp and foggy with artificial lighting from the covered structure on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with industrial oil derrick and neon signage

events.description: exits the narrow corridor and turns right onto an open street with the oil derrick now prominently visible
a car with bright headlights passes by on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: turns onto the sidewalk and proceeds along the wet street, passing industrial structures and neon signs

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen with green neon graphics
tall palm tree lining the street
tall street light casting a yellow glow on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow passage into a wide-open street, turning right along the sidewalk. An industrial oil derrick dominates the left side of the view while a bright neon billboard glows on the right. Vehicles with headlights on occasionally pass by on the wet road, and palm trees line the street as the camera continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban boulevard with mountain backdrop

events.description: mountain becomes clearly visible in the background as the fog slightly clears
passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continues walking steadily along the sidewalk, passing other pedestrians and parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: bald man in a green vest walking past the camera in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large dark mountain silhouette visible through the fog in the distance
low-rise residential structures with lit windows
vehicles parked along the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the open boulevard with a prominent mountain now visible in the foggy background. The character walks past parked cars and residential buildings on the left, encountering occasional pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. The street remains dimly lit by periodic street lamps, maintaining the damp, atmospheric night setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic concrete corridor into a wide, atmospheric industrial boulevard at night. It begins by following a character through a narrow, enclosed passage of wet asphalt and high walls, moving toward a hazy opening where power lines and a distant oil derrick first appear. As the character emerges from the confinement, the scene expands into a broad street where the camera turns right, passing a towering oil derrick and a glowing neon billboard while vehicles glide past on the rain-slicked road. The view then opens further along the palm-lined boulevard, revealing a prominent mountain shrouded in fog in the distance. Finally, the camera continues past parked cars and residential buildings, weaving through occasional pedestrians under the dim glow of periodic street lamps.
